themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Written for post-exilic Israel (c. 450-400 BCE), the Chronicler reinterprets earlier accounts...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "יָרֵ֖א: afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
